nasb.text: The chief jailer did not supervise anything under Joseph’s charge because the Lord was with him; and whatever he did, the Lord made to prosper.

esv.text: The keeper of the prison paid no attention to anything that was in Joseph’s charge, because the Lord was with him. And whatever he did, the Lord made it succeed.

cnv.text: 凡交在約瑟手裡的事務，監獄長一概不聞不問；因為耶和華與約瑟同在，使他所作的盡都順利。

ccb.text: 凡交到约瑟手中的事情，监狱长都很放心，因为耶和华与约瑟同在，使他凡事亨通。

csbs.text: 监狱长对约瑟手中的一切事都不查看，因耶和华与他同在，耶和华使他所做的一切都顺利。
